scripts.dev: npm run build:main && cross-env ELECTRON_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5180 concurrently -k "vite --host 127.0.0.1 --port 5180" "wait-on tcp:5180 && electron ./dist-electron/main.js"
scripts.build: npm run build:web && npm run build:main
scripts.dist:win: npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.json --win portable
